message:
fix(SessionDashboard): add evidenceEntries to PhaseContent component

The evidenceEntries useMemo was defined in SessionDashboard but used in
PhaseContent without being passed down. Duplicating the useMemo in
PhaseContent makes the variable available where it's needed.
